2026-04-24T02:02:42.1496507Z ##[group]Run set -eo pipefail

2026-04-24T02:02:42.1497135Z [36;1mmkdir -p /tmp/gh-aw/mcp-config[0m
2026-04-24T02:02:42.1497395Z [36;1m[0m
